title: Gohin Hridoy
overview: Anupam's marriage has broken down and daughter Lina's authority gets her mother. Anupam comes back to his country. Started teaching in an University. After he meet with his friend Bhashkar and his wife Sohini, gradually Anupam developed a special intimacy with Sohini. At one time, they decided to spend the rest of their life together
